items.name: Mailwarm 2.0
items.tagline: The email warmup tool, upgraded for deliverability.
items.description: Most founders rely on email to grow, but emails don’t land in the inbox by magic. Mailwarm 2.0 is the premium email warmup and deliverability system built to give your emails the best chance of reaching the inbox. It combines automated warmup, real engagement, monitoring, infrastructure checks, and experts call available for every subscriber.

items.name: Astra Autonomous Pentest
items.tagline: AI agents that find, validate, and fix every vulnerability
items.description: Astra Autonomous Pentesting makes self-healing software the new standard, a category we’re defining after 8 years and 5,000+ real-world pentests. An army of offensive pentesters and bounty hunter agents that discovers complex chained vulnerabilities, an independent validator layer drives false positives to near-zero, and AI-fix agents deliver remediation as native Cursor, Copilot, and Claude Code prompts. The reactive pentest era is over.

items.name: Empromptu AI
items.tagline: Train Fine Tuned Models With AI Apps You're Already Building
items.description: Most AI apps launch on someone else’s model and stay there forever. Empromptu AI turns live AI features into custom models you own. As your app runs, Empromptu AI captures real-world usage, human corrections, and edge cases from live AI workflows, then uses that signal to train a custom model you own. Improve accuracy, lower inference costs, and stop depending forever on rented intelligence from the same providers moving into your category.

items.name: Google Gemma 4 12B
items.tagline: Run multimodal AI locally with an encoder-free architecture
items.description: Gemma 4 12B processes text, vision, and audio natively without separate encoders, running on 16GB VRAM. For developers building local agentic applications who need multimodal capability without cloud dependency.

items.name: Build Club Campus
items.tagline: Virtual AI School: Upskill in AI and Become Great at it Fast
items.description: Build Club Campus is a fun, gamified and community-driven virtual AI school for learning AI by building with it. Static courses get old fast in AI, so Campus helps you stay current through bite-sized courses, real projects, role-based use cases and community templates that evolve with the tools. Earn certifications in OpenAI, Claude, Copilot and more, and become great at AI fast - for work, startups or side hustles. It’s 100% free, as part of our mission to enable anyone to build with AI.

items.name: AppWizzy
items.tagline: Rent a private VM with Codex to build production apps
items.description: AppWizzy gives you a private VM with Codex installed where you build, run, and host production web apps by chatting with AI. Your code is yours, the workspace persists, and the app lives in the same environment where it was created. Pay only for AI usage, hosting days, and optional templates

items.name: Deliveryman.ai
items.tagline: Cold email infrastructure on autopilot without Gsuite
items.description: Deliveryman.ai automates the hardest parts of cold email infrastructure mailbox setup, DNS records, warmup, email verification, sending systems, blacklist monitoring, reply management, and routing. Instead of spending weeks setting up your own cold email infrastructure and fixing deliverability issues, you can launch faster, scale confidently, and focus on what actually drives revenue. No G-suite required. Warmup, email list verification, Blacklist monitoring, etc. all included in one tool.

items.name: Novus
items.tagline: Catch and fix usability issues automatically as you ship
items.description: Novus is the product agent built for teams that ship fast. Connect your codebase and Novus automatically instruments, analyzes, and improves your product — no manual setup. It monitors continuously, flags usability issues proactively, and delivers intelligence for engineers and PMs.

items.name: TimeTuna.com
items.tagline: If Calendly had gorgeous video backgrounds
items.description: If Calendly was for people who care about design. We help founders, freelancers, and studios create a memorable impression on their prospective clients through booking pages with beautiful video backgrounds. Your video, your domain, your taste. You have a character. Let you booking page have a character too. Free to start, $10/month for the rest.

items.name: Koji by Brilliant
items.tagline: A world-class personal tutor for every home
items.description: This isn’t just a feature launch, it’s an evolution of our entire product experience. Brilliant is now a superintelligent tutor designed to work like the best human tutors. It asks the right questions, sketches right on your screen, and adapts to how you learn best.

items.name: Keen Code
items.tagline: A context-efficient CLI coding agent built by agents
items.description: Keen Code is an open-source, context-aware and efficient CLI coding agent written in Go. Three aspects stand it out from other similar products: - It was built from scratch by coding agents, with the full prompt/design trail preserved and shared in the repo. - It uses turn memory to keep multi-turn sessions lean which saves context significantly. - It maps MCP servers to lazy-loaded Skills instead of stuffing large schemas into context upfront. This again saves context in mult-MCP setting.

items.name: Perplexity Personal Computer for Windows
items.tagline: Run AI agents across your local files and apps on Windows
items.description: Personal Computer extends Perplexity's multi-model agent system to your Windows machine, running tasks across local files, native apps, and the web for Max and Enterprise Max subscribers on the waitlist.

items.name: Boxes.dev
items.tagline: Run Claude Code and Codex in your own cloud environment
items.description: Cloud dev environments for agentic coding. Run each Claude Code or Codex chat on its own computer in the cloud, connect from mobile and desktop, and code from anywhere.

items.name: Basedash Semantic Layer
items.tagline: Define metrics once. Use them everywhere.
items.description: The Basedash semantic layer lets teams create reusable SQL metrics and models that AI can reference across chat, charts, dashboards, insights, and automations.

items.name: Sun
items.tagline: Collaborative voice API for agents
items.description: Sun is a voice first AI model built specifically for real‑time collaborative voice interaction, not just one‑on‑one chat. ChatGPT Realtime and Gemini Live were built for one user talking to AI. Sun is built for collaboration — meetings, group calls, multi-agent debates, classrooms. One API, multi-speaker awareness, 10× the context window.

items.name: Carbon Voice Speed Dial
items.tagline: Get your whole team (humans and agents!) on speed dial
items.description: Talk to your whole team — people and AI agents — with one tap. Carbon Voice gives you a speed dial for your team. One keystroke on desktop, one tap on mobile, and you're talking to anyone — a teammate, a group, or an AI agent like OpenClaw, Hermes, n8n, Claude Code, or Tasklet. Teams see 60% less time in meetings. Now your agents are just as easy to reach.

items.name: Gather
items.tagline: Save it once, never lose it again
items.description: Easily find any design references! Gather is your second brain for visual inspiration — save screenshots, photos, and links, then search them the way you'd describe them to a friend: "that muted retro car ad."

items.name: Intelligent Terminal
items.tagline: Windows Terminal with native agent integration
items.description: Intelligent Terminal is an open-source experimental fork of Windows Terminal with native agent integration. It adds an agent status bar, context-aware agent pane, automatic error detection, session management, and command palette prompts for ACP-compatible agent CLIs.

items.name: Kai for Chrome
items.tagline: Local meeting transcription with no account needed
items.description: Kai transcribes & summarizes your Meet, Zoom, and Teams calls 100% on-device. Press ⌘⇧K, get a clean summary + action items the moment the call ends. No account, no upload, no meeting bot in the room. First Chrome extension running Whisper Base fully locally via WebGPU + WASM. No cloud STT, no API call, no signup. Free forever. Built by Morgen as the entry point to Kai, our AI executive assistant.

items.name: Extella.AI
items.tagline: Agentic platform that evolves & builds reusable systems
items.description: Extella is an agentic AI platform that self-evolves. It remembers what works and reuses it, so each task runs faster and cheaper. That memory lives in four layers: Rules adapt to you, Concepts build a knowledge base, Experts turn work into automations, and a KV store keeps your keys encrypted. Bring your own LLM, connect any tool (Slack, Notion, Gmail, GitHub), any GitHub library, ML model, or your own — all managed from a single workspace. By Day 30, it's a system only you have.
